summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-University E-Learning Platform. Backend APIs 100% functional (19/19 tests passed). Frontend loads and all core features work: homepage with dynamic stats (490+ courses, 5 universities, 150K+ MCQs), university catalog showing all 5 universities, course detail page with tabs (Overview, Modules, Quiz, Scripts), MCQ Quiz functionality working with answer submission and explanations. Fixed missing video file serving endpoint. Video player shows 'Video Ready' badge but video files have encoding issues (content issue, not code issue).

minor.issue: FIXED - Added /api/videos/{module_id} and /api/videos/{module_id}/file endpoints to serve video files

integration_issues.issue: Video player present with 'Video Ready' badge, endpoint returns 200 with video/mp4, but video has encoding issue (FFmpegDemuxer: no supported streams). This is a video file content issue, not a code issue.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/universities returns all 5 universities (UG, NVU, IASI, AAU, NAJAH)
Backend: GET /api/courses/by-university/{id} returns courses for each university
Backend: GET /api/courses/{id}/questions returns MCQ questions with proper structure
Backend: GET /api/stats/dashboard returns comprehensive stats (486 courses, 144K+ MCQs, 95.9% completion)
Frontend: Homepage loads with dynamic stats (490+ courses, 5 universities, 150K+ MCQs)
Frontend: University cards (5) display with proper styling and navigation
Frontend: University course list page shows 94 UG courses with MCQ progress
Frontend: Course detail page displays correctly with all tabs
Frontend: Quiz functionality works (start quiz, select answer, submit, see explanation, next question)
Frontend: Scripts tab shows video player with 'Video Ready' badge
Frontend: Stats Dashboard shows charts (pie, bar) and university breakdown
action_items: Video files need re-encoding - current MP4 files have encoding issues that prevent browser playback. Consider re-generating videos with proper codec (H.264/AAC) or using HeyGen's external CDN URLs if available.
UG has 20 courses with under 300 MCQs that need more questions generated (visible in dashboard)
critical_code_review_comments: Missing video serving endpoint was added - should be tested in production
Video files stored locally may not scale - consider using HeyGen CDN URLs directly
UG courses under 300 MCQs: General Biology (24), General Chemistry (24), Medical Terminology (24), Human Anatomy I (24), etc.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added FileResponse import and video serving endpoints
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - platform has 486 courses, 144K+ MCQs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Video serving endpoint was added. Video files exist but have encoding issues - need re-generation with proper codec. 20 UG courses need more MCQs to reach 300 target. Dashboard shows 95.9% completion rate.

video_playback_issue.root_cause: Video files generated by HeyGen were downloaded and stored locally with encoding that browser cannot play (FFmpegDemuxer error). The video serving endpoint works correctly (returns 200 with video/mp4) but the actual video content has incompatible codec.
video_playback_issue.mitigation: Either re-generate videos with browser-compatible codec (H.264/AAC) or use HeyGen's external CDN URL (heygen_video_url field) if available instead of local files.
